hypothesis: The v4k tied-token table can be the next board-facing no-DDR3 prototype by sharing one physical int8 token table between embedding lookup and lm_head top1 streaming, keeping position embedding separate, and avoiding full-logit materialization. This invocation promotes only the off-board package plan because board access is unavailable and Python/JQ are blocked.
prototype_plan: Use the shared int8 token table for both embedding lookup and streamed top1 output projection; keep position embedding as a 128-row side table; keep only top1 accumulator and index on chip; do not allocate a logits buffer.

validation.hardware_block_reason: no board access in this run

next_gate: When executable tooling recovers, regenerate this artifact from a script or rerun the SV sim attr. When board access returns, build the bitstream attr and execute the prepared board commands as a human-run gate.
